ddls:
CREATE TABLE "safety_functions" (
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety function */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the safety function (e.g., STO single channel, SS1-t single channel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the safety function */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., single, dual) */,
  "safety_integrity_level" TEXT /* Level of safety integrity (e.g., PLd, PLe, SIL 2, SIL 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iso_13849_1_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function this rating belongs to */,
  "rating" TEXT /* ISO 13849-1 rating (e.g., PLd, PLe) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., Cat.3, Cat.4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iso_13849_1_ratings_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iec_62061_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function this rating belongs to */,
  "rating" TEXT /* IEC 62061 rating (e.g., SIL 2, SIL 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iec_62061_ratings_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_times" (
  "response_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response time */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function this response time belongs to */,
  "max_response_time" REAL /* Maximum response time in milliseconds */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., milliseconds, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_times_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function this comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comment or context for the safety function */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., safety engineer, quality control specialist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., safety, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the safety function */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the safety function was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, device ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "safety_function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the safety function that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_safety_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("safety_function_id") REFERENCES safety_functions ("safety_function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
